it_projects.name: Cacabake
it_projects.description: Application for playing pre-rendered videos in a terminal
it_projects.long_description: Cacabake is a terminal application that can precompute videos into a pre-rendered text format using libcaca. It can then play these videos in a terminal with no performance cost related to video decoding. It was created to display animations on InsaLan servers without compromising performance.

it_projects.name: BMC
it_projects.description: Android application for controlling a virtual object in Blender using motion sensors
it_projects.long_description: Blender Motion Control is an Android application that uses a smartphone's motion sensors to control an object in the 3D modeling software Blender. An update implementing ARCore support for more accurate motion tracking was planned, but is currently on hold.

it_projects.name: Big
it_projects.description: Terminal application for displaying large text with various effects
it_projects.long_description: Big is a terminal application that can display large text with different effects, in different display modes, and at different speeds. It has a fairly complete command-line interface with many options.

it_projects.name: FlutterInk
it_projects.description: Port of a note-taking application to Flutter
it_projects.long_description: During this project carried out in my fourth year at INSA, we ported a note-taking application written in C# to Flutter. I also updated and strengthened the security of the NodeJS server. Finally, I created a Nuxt web interface to manage the database.

it_projects.name: Portfolio
it_projects.description: The website you are currently viewing
it_projects.long_description: This portfolio showcases my projects and skills, both in programming and in 3D modeling/animation.

it_projects.name: Langate 3000
it_projects.description: Captive portal for the InsaLan network
it_projects.long_description: Langate 3000 is a complete rewrite of InsaLan's captive portal. Its goal is to let players connect to the network through a web interface. I mainly worked on Netcontrol, the network connection management API (Python FastAPI), which interfaces with the router firewall via nftables.

it_projects.name: insalan.fr
it_projects.long_description: InsaLan's website presents the organization, lets players register for the event, and includes tools to manage tournaments. I mainly worked on the site's front end, migrating it from Tailwind CSS to plain CSS while redesigning it.

it_projects.name: TMT2
it_projects.description: Web application for managing Counter-Strike 2 tournaments
it_projects.long_description: Tournament Match Tracker 2 is a web interface used by InsaLan to manage Counter-Strike 2 tournaments. We added the ability to track player statistics, and I mainly worked on the front end related to that feature.

it_projects.name: Taquin
it_projects.long_description: This sliding puzzle game project was developed as part of the fourth-year Web 2 project at INSA Rennes. It also includes a basic Spring Boot backend.

it_projects.name: My Games List
it_projects.description: Demo application listing video games from a database
it_projects.long_description: This Android application was built with Jetpack Compose as part of the fourth-year Mobile Programming elective at INSA Rennes. It lists games from a database, allowing them to be filtered and displayed in different ways.

it_projects.name: mPNGp
it_projects.long_description: This MiniPNG file parser project was developed as part of the fourth-year Secure Programming course at INSA Rennes.

it_projects.name: RGBaie
it_projects.description: Network diagnostic system using an LED strip
it_projects.long_description: RGBaie is an InsaLan network monitoring project based on an LED strip. It can diagnose common network issues such as no internet connection, communication problems with VPNs, and the status of certain software components, all through a simple language of colored bands. The project consists of Arduino code for an ESP32 board that controls the LED strip, and a Python controller that runs diagnostics and communicates with the ESP32.

it_projects.name: Plans switches
it_projects.description: Advanced and flexible Typst template for easily creating network switch diagrams
it_projects.long_description: This project was created to help InsaLan network administrators easily produce clean network switch diagrams for planning and organization.

it_projects.name: Script switches
it_projects.description: Python script for automatically configuring multiple network switches via Telnet
it_projects.long_description: This project consists of a set of Python scripts used to automatically configure multiple InsaLan network switches via Telnet. I contributed a small refactor and added a script to configure Brocade switches.

it_projects.name: Scripts réseau
it_projects.description: Configuration scripts for InsaLan's network and firewall
it_projects.long_description: This set of scripts defines InsaLan's network interfaces and nftables firewall rules. I wrote several of these scripts, especially those used to route network traffic to InsaLan's various upstreams and those that block access to certain websites. I also wrote a Python script that displays information about active DHCP leases on the network head-end.

it_projects.name: Tortue Kaizen
it_projects.description: Animation created with the SFML library
it_projects.long_description: This animation, telling the story of a sea turtle that wants to become a land turtle, was created as part of the fourth-year computer graphics elective at INSA Rennes. It was built from an SFML project template. I animated the turtle in Blender, exported the animation with a Python script, and applied it using a C++ module added to the project. We also covered the basics of GLSL shaders.

it_projects.name: ADS Planner
it_projects.description: Software for assigning students to department discovery sessions
it_projects.long_description: ADS Planner is software designed to assign INSA students to three department discovery sessions. It was developed as part of a third-year project, using R with the Shiny library for the graphical interface.
